candidates.why: Generic D&A row has no visible values and is not labeled as COGS/cost of revenues. No explicit COGS-related D&A row appears alongside the selected total 'Cost of revenues/COGS', so conservative view is that any COGS D&A is already embedded in the selected COGS total.
Explicitly labeled as SGA, not COGS, so it should not be added to the COGS bucket.

variables.notes: No separate operating D&A row attributable to COGS is visible in the excerpt. The selected parent COGS row is the total 'Cost of revenues/COGS', so adding any separate D&A would risk double counting.

candidates.why: This is the only explicit operating D&A row relevant to SG&A, but it appears to be a sub-component of the selected parent row 'Sales costs': in the visible years, 'Sales costs' approximately equals 'Depreciation/Amortization in SGA' plus 'Sales costs - Balancing value'. Therefore it is already embedded in the selected XSGA bucket and should not be added separately.
Generic D&A row has no visible values and does not clearly sit as a separate same-level operating expense outside the selected SG&A rows. Not suitable for separate addition.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA bucket already includes 'Sales costs', 'Administration costs', and 'Research and development costs'. The explicit 'Depreciation/Amortization in SGA' line behaves like a component nested under 'Sales costs', so separate addition would double count. R&D is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so no separate R&D D&A addition is warranted here.
